message: fix: Update Zig setup action to goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2 and remove build job

files.patch:
@@ -15,31 +15,6 @@ concurrency:
   cancel-in-progress: true
 
 jobs:
-  # =============================================================================
-  # Build & Unit Tests
-  # =============================================================================
-  build:
-    name: Build (${{ matrix.os }})
-    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
-    strategy:
-      fail-fast: false
-      matrix:
-        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
-
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-
-      - name: Setup Zig
-        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v1
-        with:
-          version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
-
-      - name: Build
-        run: zig build
-
-      - name: Run unit tests
-        run: zig build test
-
   # =============================================================================
   # CPython Compatibility Tests (Platform-specific)
   # =============================================================================
@@ -52,7 +27,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Setup Zig
-        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v1
+        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
         with:
           version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
 
@@ -71,7 +46,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Setup Zig
-        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v1
+        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
         with:
           version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
 
@@ -90,7 +65,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Setup Zig
-        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v1
+        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
         with:
           version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
 
@@ -109,7 +84,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Setup Zig
-        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v1
+        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
         with:
           version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
